requirement_topic.en: Generic EMC Emission Limits — Industrial Environment
requirement_topic.zh: 通用电磁兼容骚扰发射限值（工业环境）
requirement_topic.zht: 通用電磁相容騷擾發射限值（工業環境）

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters installed in industrial locations must comply with the essential requirements of EMC Directive 2014/30/EU. Where no product-specific emission standard applies, EN IEC 61000-6-4:2019 (generic emission standard for industrial environments) provides a harmonised route to presumption of conformity. The standard covers conducted and radiated emission limits from 9 kHz to 400 GHz on AC mains, signal, and control ports.
summary.zh: 安装于工业场所的并网光伏逆变器须符合EMC指令2014/30/EU的基本要求。在无适用产品专项骚扰标准的情况下，EN IEC 61000-6-4:2019（工业环境通用发射标准）为推定符合性提供协调路径，覆盖9 kHz至400 GHz频段的交流电源端口、信号端口及控制端口的传导和辐射发射限值。
summary.zht: 安裝於工業場所的並網光伏逆變器須符合EMC指令2014/30/EU的基本要求。在無適用產品專項騷擾標準的情況下，EN IEC 61000-6-4:2019（工業環境通用發射標準）為推定符合性提供協調路徑，涵蓋9 kHz至400 GHz頻段的交流電源端口、信號端口及控制端口的傳導和輻射發射限值。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61000-6-4:2019 — Generic standards: Emission for industrial environments
Commission Implementing Decision (EU) 2019/1326 of 5 August 2019 (OJ L 206, 6.8.2019, p. 27) [UNVERIFIED — partial reference]

summary.en: GB 17799.4-2022 (mandatory national standard, IDT with IEC 61000-6-4:2018) sets equivalent conducted and radiated emission limits for industrial-environment electrical and electronic equipment in China. It superseded GB 17799.4-2012 and is administered by the State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR). For PV inverters, compliance is typically demonstrated via the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) process or type-test reports citing this standard.
summary.zh: GB 17799.4-2022（强制性国家标准，等同采用IEC 61000-6-4:2018）规定了中国工业环境电气电子设备的等效传导和辐射骚扰发射限值，由国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）管理，替代了GB 17799.4-2012。光伏逆变器通常通过引用本标准的型式试验报告或中国强制性产品认证（CCC）程序证明符合性。
summary.zht: GB 17799.4-2022（強制性國家標準，等同採用IEC 61000-6-4:2018）規定了中國工業環境電氣電子設備的等效傳導和輻射騷擾發射限值，由國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）管理，替代了GB 17799.4-2012。光伏逆變器通常通過引用本標準的型式試驗報告或中國強制性產品認證（CCC）程序證明符合性。

standards_or_laws: GB 17799.4-2022 — Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC): Generic standards — Part 4: Emission for industrial environments (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-6-4:2018)

gap.en: Both standards adopt IEC 61000-6-4 (EU: 2019 edition; CN: 2022 edition based on IEC 2018 edition). Technical limits are substantially harmonised. A gap may arise from edition lag: the EU harmonised edition is EN IEC 61000-6-4:2019 whereas CN adopts the 2018 IEC base text. Laboratories accredited to ILAC MRA typically accept test reports from either jurisdiction, but the EU Declaration of Conformity must reference the EN (European Norm) designation. [UNVERIFIED — edition alignment and mutual recognition details should be confirmed with a notified body]
gap.zh: 两套标准均采用IEC 61000-6-4（欧盟采用2019版；中国2022版基于IEC 2018版），技术限值基本协调一致。潜在差异源于版本差异：EU协调标准为EN IEC 61000-6-4:2019，中国采用IEC 2018版本文。ILAC MRA认可实验室通常接受两地检测报告，但EU符合性声明须引用EN（欧洲规范）编号。【未经核实——版本对齐和互认细节应向公告机构确认】
gap.zht: 兩套標準均採用IEC 61000-6-4（歐盟採用2019版；中國2022版基於IEC 2018版），技術限值基本協調一致。潛在差異源於版本差異：EU協調標準為EN IEC 61000-6-4:2019，中國採用IEC 2018版本文。ILAC MRA認可實驗室通常接受兩地檢測報告，但EU符合性聲明須引用EN（歐洲規範）編號。【未經核實——版本對齊和互認細節應向公告機構確認】

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory for CE marking. Essential requirements under Directive 2014/30/EU are legally binding; use of harmonised standard EN IEC 61000-6-4 creates rebuttable presumption of conformity.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory national standard (GB). Required for CCC certification and market access in China.

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese CE-certified PV inverters with existing EN IEC 61000-6-4 test reports are positioned to satisfy EU emission requirements for industrial environments; however, the specific test report edition, accreditation scope, and DoC referencing must be individually reviewed. This comparison is informational only.
compliance_verdict.zh: 已取得EN IEC 61000-6-4检测报告的中国CE认证光伏逆变器在工业环境骚扰发射合规方面具备基础；但具体报告版本、认可范围及符合性声明引用标准须逐案核查。本比较仅供参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: 已取得EN IEC 61000-6-4檢測報告的中國CE認證光伏逆變器在工業環境騷擾發射合規方面具備基礎；但具體報告版本、認可範圍及符合性聲明引用標準須逐案核查。本比較僅供參考。

requirement_topic.en: Generic EMC Immunity Requirements — Industrial Environment
requirement_topic.zh: 通用电磁兼容抗扰度要求（工业环境）
requirement_topic.zht: 通用電磁相容抗擾度要求（工業環境）

summary.en: Under EMC Directive 2014/30/EU, equipment must withstand electromagnetic disturbances without degraded function. EN IEC 61000-6-2:2019 (generic immunity standard for industrial environments) is the harmonised standard providing a presumption of conformity. It specifies immunity test levels and performance criteria for phenomena including electrostatic discharge (ESD), radiated RF, conducted RF, electrical fast transient/burst, surge, voltage dips, and power-frequency magnetic fields.
summary.zh: 依据EMC指令2014/30/EU，设备须能在不降低功能的情况下承受电磁骚扰。EN IEC 61000-6-2:2019（工业环境通用抗扰度标准）为推定符合性的协调标准，规定了静电放电（ESD）、辐射射频场、传导射频、电快速瞬变/群脉冲、浪涌、电压暂降及工频磁场等现象的抗扰度试验等级与性能判据。
summary.zht: 依據EMC指令2014/30/EU，設備須能在不降低功能的情況下承受電磁騷擾。EN IEC 61000-6-2:2019（工業環境通用抗擾度標準）為推定符合性的協調標準，規定了靜電放電（ESD）、輻射射頻場、傳導射頻、電快速瞬變/群脈衝、浪湧、電壓暫降及工頻磁場等現象的抗擾度試驗等級與性能判據。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61000-6-2:2019 — Generic standards: Immunity for industrial environments
Commission Implementing Decision (EU) 2019/1326 of 5 August 2019 (OJ L 206, 6.8.2019) [UNVERIFIED — partial reference]

summary.en: GB/T 17799.2-2023 (recommended national standard, IDT with IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020) provides equivalent immunity test levels and performance criteria for industrial-environment equipment in China. Its recommended (GB/T) status means it is not legally compulsory but is widely applied in type testing and referenced in product certification programmes. The 2023 revision superseded GB/T 17799.2-2003.
summary.zh: GB/T 17799.2-2023（推荐性国家标准，等同采用IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020）为中国工业环境设备提供等效的抗扰度试验等级与性能判据。其推荐性（GB/T）地位意味着在法律上并非强制，但已广泛用于型式试验并被产品认证项目引用。2023版替代了GB/T 17799.2-2003。
summary.zht: GB/T 17799.2-2023（推薦性國家標準，等同採用IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020）為中國工業環境設備提供等效的抗擾度試驗等級與性能判據。其推薦性（GB/T）地位意味著在法律上並非強制，但已廣泛用於型式試驗並被產品認證項目引用。2023版替代了GB/T 17799.2-2003。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17799.2-2023 — Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC): Generic standards — Part 2: Immunity standard for industrial environments (recommended, IDT IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020)

gap.en: The EU harmonised standard is EN IEC 61000-6-2:2019; the Chinese equivalent is GB/T 17799.2-2023 based on IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020. The IEC base editions differ slightly; both converge on the same immunity test portfolio. A structural difference is that CN immunity compliance is recommended (GB/T) rather than mandatory, whereas EU immunity compliance is a legal essential requirement. [UNVERIFIED — edition alignment should be confirmed]
gap.zh: EU协调标准为EN IEC 61000-6-2:2019；中国等效标准为基于IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020的GB/T 17799.2-2023，IEC基础版本略有差异，但抗扰度试验项目基本一致。结构性差异在于：中国抗扰度合规为推荐性（GB/T）而非强制，而欧盟抗扰度合规属于法定基本要求。【未经核实】
gap.zht: EU協調標準為EN IEC 61000-6-2:2019；中國等效標準為基於IEC 61000-6-2:2016+AMD1:2020的GB/T 17799.2-2023，IEC基礎版本略有差異，但抗擾度試驗項目基本一致。結構性差異在於：中國抗擾度合規為推薦性（GB/T）而非強制，而歐盟抗擾度合規屬於法定基本要求。【未經核實】

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory — immunity is a legally binding essential requirement under Directive 2014/30/EU. EN IEC 61000-6-2 use grants presumption of conformity.
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) — not legally compulsory, but standard industry practice for type testing and certification.

compliance_verdict.en: PV inverters with existing GB/T 17799.2-based immunity test reports carry substantive technical equivalence with EN IEC 61000-6-2; however, the EU DoC must reference the EN-designated standard and tests must be conducted by an accredited laboratory. The mandatory vs. recommended status difference is a procedural, not technical, distinction. This comparison is informational only.
compliance_verdict.zh: 具有GB/T 17799.2检测报告的光伏逆变器在技术层面与EN IEC 61000-6-2基本等效；但EU符合性声明须引用EN编号标准，且试验须由认可实验室完成。强制性与推荐性的差异属程序层面而非技术层面。本比较仅供参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: 具有GB/T 17799.2檢測報告的光伏逆變器在技術層面與EN IEC 61000-6-2基本等效；但EU符合性聲明須引用EN編號標準，且試驗須由認可實驗室完成。強制性與推薦性的差異屬程序層面而非技術層面。本比較僅供參考。

requirement_topic.en: Harmonic Current Emission Limits — Low-Voltage Grid Connection
requirement_topic.zh: 谐波电流发射限值（低压电网接入）
requirement_topic.zht: 諧波電流發射限值（低壓電網接入）

summary.en: PV inverters connected to public low-voltage supply systems must limit injected harmonic currents. EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021 applies to equipment with rated input current ≤ 16 A per phase (Class A or D for inverters depending on waveform shape). EN IEC 61000-3-12:2011 applies to equipment with rated input current > 16 A and ≤ 75 A per phase; connection is conditional on the short-circuit ratio (Rsce) at the point of connection being ≥ the threshold specified for the applicable harmonic limits. Both standards are harmonised under Directive 2014/30/EU.
summary.zh: 接入公共低压供电系统的光伏逆变器须限制注入电网的谐波电流。EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021适用于额定输入电流≤16 A/相的设备（逆变器依波形形状归为A类或D类）；EN IEC 61000-3-12:2011适用于额定输入电流>16 A且≤75 A/相的设备，接入条件为接入点短路比（Rsce）满足相应谐波限值阈值。两项标准均在指令2014/30/EU下协调。
summary.zht: 接入公共低壓供電系統的光伏逆變器須限制注入電網的諧波電流。EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021適用於額定輸入電流≤16 A/相的設備（逆變器依波形形狀歸為A類或D類）；EN IEC 61000-3-12:2011適用於額定輸入電流>16 A且≤75 A/相的設備，接入條件為接入點短路比（Rsce）滿足相應諧波限值閾值。兩項標準均在指令2014/30/EU下協調。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (equipment input current ≤ 16 A per phase)
EN IEC 61000-3-12:2011 — Limits for harmonic currents produced by equipment connected to public low-voltage systems with input current > 16 A and ≤ 75 A per phase

summary.en: GB 17625.1-2022 (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020, effective 1 July 2024) sets harmonic current emission limits for equipment with input current ≤ 16 A per phase. For higher-current equipment (> 16 A and ≤ 75 A), GB/T 17625.7-2013 (recommended, based on IEC 61000-3-12) provides equivalent conditional-connection limits based on short-circuit ratio. Both standards are administered by SAMR and are part of the CCC/type-test regime for PV inverters sold in China.
summary.zh: GB 17625.1-2022（强制性国家标准，等同采用IEC 61000-3-2:2020，2024年7月1日起实施）规定了输入电流≤16 A/相设备的谐波电流发射限值。对于较大电流设备（>16 A且≤75 A/相），GB/T 17625.7-2013（推荐性，基于IEC 61000-3-12）提供了基于短路比的等效条件接入限值。两项标准均由SAMR管理，属于中国市场光伏逆变器CCC/型式试验体系的组成部分。
summary.zht: GB 17625.1-2022（強制性國家標準，等同採用IEC 61000-3-2:2020，2024年7月1日起實施）規定了輸入電流≤16 A/相設備的諧波電流發射限值。對於較大電流設備（>16 A且≤75 A/相），GB/T 17625.7-2013（推薦性，基於IEC 61000-3-12）提供了基於短路比的等效條件接入限值。兩項標準均由SAMR管理，屬於中國市場光伏逆變器CCC/型式試驗體系的組成部分。

standards_or_laws: GB 17625.1-2022 — EMC: Limits — Part 1: Limits for harmonic current emissions (input current ≤ 16 A per phase) (mandatory, IDT IEC 61000-3-2:2020)

GB/T 17625.7-2013 — EMC: Limits — Part 7: Assessment of emission limits for the connection of three-phase balanced equipment to MV, HV and EHV power systems (recommended) [UNVERIFIED — applicability to ≤75 A equipment should be confirmed against GB/T 17625.3 or equivalent]

gap.en: GB 17625.1-2022 is based on IEC 61000-3-2:2020 while the EU harmonised standard is EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021 (also tracking IEC 61000-3-2:2018+A1:2020). Technical harmonic limits are very closely aligned. A practical difference exists for higher-current PV inverters: the EU applies EN IEC 61000-3-12:2011 with conditional-connection rules tied to Rsce, while the equivalent Chinese standard lineage for 16–75 A equipment is less clearly mandated. Exporters should verify the rated current band of each inverter model to determine which standard tier applies in the EU. [UNVERIFIED — Rsce threshold and CN equivalent for 16–75 A band]
gap.zh: GB 17625.1-2022基于IEC 61000-3-2:2020，EU协调标准为EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021（同样追踪IEC 61000-3-2:2018+A1:2020），谐波限值技术层面高度一致。实际差异存在于较大电流逆变器：EU针对EN IEC 61000-3-12:2011的条件接入规则基于Rsce，而中国对16–75 A段的等效强制路径尚不明确。出口商须核实每款逆变器额定电流段，以确认适用的EU标准层级。【未经核实】
gap.zht: GB 17625.1-2022基於IEC 61000-3-2:2020，EU協調標準為EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019/A1:2021（同樣追蹤IEC 61000-3-2:2018+A1:2020），諧波限值技術層面高度一致。實際差異存在於較大電流逆變器：EU針對EN IEC 61000-3-12:2011的條件接入規則基於Rsce，而中國對16–75 A段的等效強制路徑尚不明確。出口商須核實每款逆變器額定電流段，以確認適用的EU標準層級。【未經核實】

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory for CE marking. EN IEC 61000-3-2 and EN IEC 61000-3-12 are harmonised standards under Directive 2014/30/EU; compliance is required for placing equipment on the EU market.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 17625.1-2022 is mandatory (GB). GB/T 17625.7-2013 is recommended (GB/T).

source.publisher: State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR) / National Standardization Administration

compliance_verdict.en: GB 17625.1-2022 and EN IEC 61000-3-2 are both derived from the same IEC base text with minimal technical divergence; a Chinese type-test report to the GB standard is a strong indicator of technical alignment with EU limits, but the EU DoC must cite the EN-designated standard. The 16–75 A band requires a separate EU conformity assessment to EN IEC 61000-3-12. This comparison is informational only.
compliance_verdict.zh: GB 17625.1-2022与EN IEC 61000-3-2均源自相同IEC基础文本，技术差异极小；基于GB标准的中国型式试验报告可作为技术对齐的有力参考，但EU符合性声明须引用EN编号标准。16–75 A段须另行就EN IEC 61000-3-12开展EU符合性评估。本比较仅供参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: GB 17625.1-2022與EN IEC 61000-3-2均源自相同IEC基礎文本，技術差異極小；基於GB標準的中國型式試驗報告可作為技術對齊的有力參考，但EU符合性聲明須引用EN編號標準。16–75 A段須另行就EN IEC 61000-3-12開展EU符合性評估。本比較僅供參考。

requirement_topic.en: Voltage Fluctuation and Flicker Limits — Low-Voltage Grid Connection
requirement_topic.zh: 电压波动与闪烁限值（低压电网接入）
requirement_topic.zht: 電壓波動與閃爍限值（低壓電網接入）

summary.en: PV inverters connected to public low-voltage networks must not cause excessive voltage fluctuations or flicker that could affect other users. EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 (equipment ≤ 16 A per phase, unconditional connection) limits voltage changes (dc), relative voltage change (dmax), and short-term and long-term flicker severity (Pst, Plt). EN IEC 61000-3-11:2019 applies to equipment > 16 A and ≤ 75 A per phase where connection is conditional on the system impedance at the point of connection meeting a specified Zmax. Both are harmonised under Directive 2014/30/EU.
summary.zh: 接入公共低压电网的光伏逆变器不得引起对其他用户造成影响的过度电压波动或闪烁。EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021（≤16 A/相设备，无条件接入）限制电压变化（dc）、最大相对电压变化（dmax）以及短期和长期闪烁严重度（Pst、Plt）。EN IEC 61000-3-11:2019适用于>16 A且≤75 A/相设备，接入条件为接入点系统阻抗满足规定的Zmax。两项标准均在指令2014/30/EU下协调。
summary.zht: 接入公共低壓電網的光伏逆變器不得引起對其他用戶造成影響的過度電壓波動或閃爍。EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021（≤16 A/相設備，無條件接入）限制電壓變化（dc）、最大相對電壓變化（dmax）以及短期和長期閃爍嚴重度（Pst、Plt）。EN IEC 61000-3-11:2019適用於>16 A且≤75 A/相設備，接入條件為接入點系統阻抗滿足規定的Zmax。兩項標準均在指令2014/30/EU下協調。

standards_or_laws: EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker: equipment with rated current ≤ 16 A per phase, not subject to conditional connection
EN IEC 61000-3-11:2019 — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker: equipment with rated current > 16 A and ≤ 75 A per phase [UNVERIFIED — OJ harmonised citation year]

summary.en: GB 17625.2-2007 (mandatory, based on IEC 61000-3-3:2005) sets equivalent voltage fluctuation and flicker limits for equipment with rated current ≤ 16 A per phase. For higher-current equipment (> 16 A, ≤ 75 A), GB/T 17625.3 series or GB/T 12326-2008 (power quality — voltage fluctuation and flicker, grid-side) may be referenced, though the product-level conditional-connection standard equivalent to IEC 61000-3-11 is less clearly codified in China's mandatory framework. [UNVERIFIED — current status of GB 17625.2 and exact CN equivalent for 16–75 A band]
summary.zh: GB 17625.2-2007（强制性国家标准，基于IEC 61000-3-3:2005）规定了额定电流≤16 A/相设备的等效电压波动与闪烁限值。对于较大电流设备（>16 A，≤75 A/相），可参考GB/T 17625.3系列或GB/T 12326-2008（电能质量——电压波动与闪烁，电网侧），但与IEC 61000-3-11等效的产品级条件接入标准在中国强制性框架中尚未明确成文。【未经核实】
summary.zht: GB 17625.2-2007（強制性國家標準，基於IEC 61000-3-3:2005）規定了額定電流≤16 A/相設備的等效電壓波動與閃爍限值。對於較大電流設備（>16 A，≤75 A/相），可參考GB/T 17625.3系列或GB/T 12326-2008（電能質量——電壓波動與閃爍，電網側），但與IEC 61000-3-11等效的產品級條件接入標準在中國強制性框架中尚未明確成文。【未經核實】

standards_or_laws: GB 17625.2-2007 — EMC: Limits — Limitation of voltage changes, voltage fluctuations and flicker for equipment with rated current ≤ 16 A per phase (mandatory, based on IEC 61000-3-3:2005)
GB/T 12326-2008 — Power quality: Voltage fluctuation and flicker (recommended, grid-side grid quality standard) [UNVERIFIED — applicability as product-level compliance route]

gap.en: GB 17625.2-2007 is based on IEC 61000-3-3:2005 whereas the current EU harmonised standard is EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021 (IEC 61000-3-3:2013+A1:2017+A2:2021). The Chinese standard is an older edition; differences in measurement method details (e.g. d-factor table updates, reference impedance) may exist. For the 16–75 A band, a clear CN product-level mandatory equivalent to EN IEC 61000-3-11 appears to be absent. Exporters targeting the EU should obtain tests to the current EN editions regardless of existing CN reports. [UNVERIFIED]
gap.zh: GB 17625.2-2007基于IEC 61000-3-3:2005，而当前EU协调标准为EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021（IEC 61000-3-3:2013+A1:2017+A2:2021）。中国标准为较旧版本，在测量方法细节（如d因子表更新、参考阻抗）方面可能存在差异。16–75 A段明显缺乏与EN IEC 61000-3-11等效的中国产品级强制性标准。面向EU出口的制造商应就当前EN版本单独取得检测，不能仅依赖现有中国报告。【未经核实】
gap.zht: GB 17625.2-2007基於IEC 61000-3-3:2005，而當前EU協調標準為EN IEC 61000-3-3:2013/A2:2021（IEC 61000-3-3:2013+A1:2017+A2:2021）。中國標準為較舊版本，在測量方法細節（如d因子表更新、參考阻抗）方面可能存在差異。16–75 A段明顯缺乏與EN IEC 61000-3-11等效的中國產品級強制性標準。面向EU出口的製造商應就當前EN版本單獨取得檢測，不能僅依賴現有中國報告。【未經核實】

mandatory_status.eu: Mandatory for CE marking under Directive 2014/30/EU. EN IEC 61000-3-3 and EN IEC 61000-3-11 are harmonised standards conferring presumption of conformity.
mandatory_status.cn: GB 17625.2-2007 is mandatory (GB). GB/T 12326-2008 is recommended (GB/T).

compliance_verdict.en: For the ≤ 16 A band, GB 17625.2-2007 and EN IEC 61000-3-3 share IEC ancestry but differ in edition; a fresh test to the current EN edition is advisable. For the 16–75 A band, the absence of a clearly equivalent mandatory CN standard means EU-specific testing to EN IEC 61000-3-11 is likely required. The edition gap in the ≤ 16 A band represents the most actionable compliance consideration. This comparison is informational only.
compliance_verdict.zh: 就≤16 A段而言，GB 17625.2-2007与EN IEC 61000-3-3同源但版本不同，建议按当前EN版本重新检测。16–75 A段缺乏明确等效的CN强制性标准，很可能须针对EU就EN IEC 61000-3-11专项检测。≤16 A段的版本差距是最值得关注的合规要点。本比较仅供参考。
compliance_verdict.zht: 就≤16 A段而言，GB 17625.2-2007與EN IEC 61000-3-3同源但版本不同，建議按當前EN版本重新檢測。16–75 A段缺乏明確等效的CN強制性標準，很可能須針對EU就EN IEC 61000-3-11專項檢測。≤16 A段的版本差距是最值得關注的合規要點。本比較僅供參考。
